My 100-Day Body Recomposition Experiment, as a Software Engineer

Kind of funny, right? A tech blog talking about body recomposition. On 2026/3/21 I started a 100-day experiment to build muscle and cut body fat. Here's the whole thing — why I did it, how I planned it, what it cost, how I executed, and the final results. If you're an engineer thinking about doing the same, maybe this gives you a little direction.
